text.title: Agentic AI Product Ops Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the agent ops-ready (goal predicate + budgeted actions + runbook + dashboard + regression hook)?

branch.when: goal_predicate_set == true AND every_action_has_budget == true AND runbook_pre_launch == true AND dashboard_wired == true AND regression_hook_set == true
branch.conclusion: Route traffic to the agent. Surface goal-achievement-rate, autonomy-ratio, cost-per-task, escalation-rate, and behavioural-regression status on the ops dashboard.
Block launch. Pin a machine-verifiable goal predicate before routing traffic.
Block launch. Add daily/weekly budgets to every autonomous action — unbudgeted actions are tail-risk.
Block launch. Write the escalation runbook (human role + channel + SLA + triggers) before routing any traffic.
Block launch. Wire a regression test set + auto-trigger on model bump before launch.

example.p: Goal predicate set, refund budget 100/day, runbook pinned, dashboard live, regression hook armed. → conclusion r5-agentic-unit-metrics-on-dashboard → green light.
